event.subject: Reminder: cleaning appointment Mon May 26 at 4:00 PM
event.body: Hi Omar, reminder for your dental cleaning Monday May 26 at 4:00 PM with Dr. Patel. Reply or call (555) 019-8832 to reschedule.
